scripts.build:web: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); h=h.replace('<script src=\"https://cdn.tailwindcss.com\"></script>','<link rel=\"stylesheet\" href=\"tailwind.min.css\">').replace('<script src=\"https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest\"></script>','<script src=\"lucide.min.js\"></script>'); fs.writeFileSync('www/index.html',h);"
